Help & Support

Account & Data

Frequently Asked Questions

Pakiza is an Android app by HSR Utility offering a curated collection of HD Islamic wallpapers, status images, and ringtones & nasheeds — all free to use. It is designed specifically for the Muslim community.

Pakiza is currently in development and will be launching on the Google Play Store soon. Drop us an email at support@hsrutility.com and we'll notify you when it's live.

Yes. Core content — wallpapers, status images, ringtones, and nasheeds — is completely free to browse, save, and share.

Email us at support@hsrutility.com with the subject line "Bug Report — Pakiza" or "Feature Request — Pakiza". We read every email and reply within 48 hours.

You can request permanent deletion of your account and data at any time. Visit our Delete My Account page for full step-by-step instructions.

Go to Delete My Account

Pakiza supports Android 7.0 (Nougat) and above. We recommend keeping your device updated for the best experience.

Still need help?

Can't find what you're looking for? Email us — we reply within 48 hours.
